vaultLockedPlaceholder.title: Vault is locked
vaultLockedPlaceholder.description: This page requires an unlocked vault. Unlock the vault from the header.

siteIcons.label: Show site icons
siteIcons.descriptionOn: Site icons are enabled. Each entry's website address is sent to your server to look up its icon.
siteIcons.descriptionOff: Site icons are off. No website addresses leave your device for icon lookups.
siteIcons.privacyFooter: When enabled, your server fetches each site's icon on your behalf. No website address is sent to any third party from your browser — only to your own server.
siteIcons.saveError: Failed to save icon preference. Please try again.

emergencyAccess.description: Allow trusted contacts to access your vault in an emergency. Detailed management is on the Emergency Access page.

comingSoon: This feature will be available in an upcoming release.
